summary: Completed comprehensive testing of private notes/chat feature for person profiles. All messaging functionality working perfectly including note creation, display, deletion, and cascade deletion when person is removed.

minor_issues.issue: Backend test cleanup produces false failures when trying to delete already-deleted persons
minor_issues.impact: Test cleanup only - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/persons/{id}/messages - retrieves all notes for person
Error handling - 404 for notes on non-existent persons
Error handling - 404 for non-existent message deletion
Cascade deletion - deleting person removes all their notes
Person detail page loads with Private Notes section
Note input field is visible and functional (data-testid='note-input')
Notes display in chat area with proper timestamps
Delete note button appears on hover and works (data-testid='delete-message-{id}')
Form validation - empty messages cannot be sent
Form validation - whitespace-only messages cannot be sent
Proper navigation to person detail page
UI components styled correctly with dark theme
